calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Continued To Dec-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Judith Baer appearing for and with executor Charla Strong. All three beneficiaries are in court. Issue on getting a loan addressed. The lender has agreed to a loan to the estate and two of the beneficiaries. The third beneficiary agrees to the loan. Title of property will pass to all three beneficiaries. Court is approving the loan. Order signed. Final distribution is continued to 12/27. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
